scalar_template: one-dimensional scalar parabolic zero-number theorem on a fixed interval with closed local operator, admissible boundary data, regular coefficients, and no sign-indefinite external source capable of creating new zeros
u1_equation: D_t u1 = 2 u1 partial_z psi1 + nu Ltilde u1
v_barrier_equation: D_t v = nu Ltilde v + 2 v partial_z psi1 + 2 u1 partial_z^2 psi1 - (partial_z u^r) partial_r u1 - (partial_z u^z) v
